title: Analysis accompanying "Dynamically regulated transcription factors are encoded by highly unstable mRNAs in the Drosophila larval brain"
author: Thompson, Mary Kay
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository documents the raw data processing and figure generation for the article “Dynamically regulated transcription factors are encoded by highly unstable mRNAs in the  Drosophila  larval brain”, doi: 10.1261/rna.079552.122.
